summary: Large matching PR for the melee if module, especially soundtest, if_2F72, and ifmagnify. It added many function bodies, replaced several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes with typed signatures, exposed ifStatus_803F9628 for cross-TU use, and added/adjusted interface-related structs and headers. Bot evidence reports 57 new 100% matches and 31 unmatched-function improvements; reviewer approved while noting rough source with many unrolled loops.

key_files.role: Main soundtest decomp target; largest changed file with many newly matched or improved functions reported by the bot.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists many main/melee/if/soundtest new matches and improvements

key_files.role: Added many if_2F72 function bodies for HUD/status animation object handling, audio trigger timing, JObj/GObj setup, and archive loading.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: if_2F72.c adds fn_802F7288 through if_802F7D08 bodies
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists if_2F72 new matches and improvements

key_files.role: Added ifMagnify function bodies for camera/object setup, cleanup, color/default initialization, archive loading, and ignore_offscreen state toggles.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifmagnify.c adds ifMagnify_802FC618, ifMagnify_802FC750, ifMagnify_802FC7C0, ifMagnify_802FC870, ifMagnify_802FC8E8, ifMagnify_802FC940
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists ifmagnify matches and improvements

key_files.role: Header updates for soundtest signatures and declarations.
Replaced several unknown prototypes with typed prototypes and added if/forward.h.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: if_2F72.h changes fn_802F7288, fn_802F75D4, fn_802F7670, fn_802F770C, fn_802F77F8, fn_802F7994 prototypes

key_files.role: Replaced unknown ifMagnify prototypes with typed void/signature declarations and added extern ifMagnify_804D57E8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifmagnify.h prototype changes for ifMagnify_802FC3BC through ifMagnify_802FC940

key_files.role: Made ifStatus_803F9628 non-static and adjusted Element_803F9628 initializer shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifStatus_803F9628 changes from static Element_803F9628 to exported Element_803F9628

key_files.role: Header declarations added for status interfaces used by if_2F72.
Small baselib header addition required by this PR slice.

what_changed: Added many decompiled function bodies in src/melee/if/if_2F72.c, including animation/audio update helpers, GObj/JObj lifecycle callbacks, slot-based object creation functions, and archive-loading setup.

Added several ifMagnify bodies in src/melee/if/ifmagnify.c for camera creation, viewport/scissor setup, per-player magnify cleanup, color/default setup, archive initialization, and ignore_offscreen toggles.
Changed headers from placeholder UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations to typed prototypes in if_2F72.h and ifmagnify.h.
Changed ifStatus_803F9628 from static file-local data to an exported Element_803F9628 array used by if_2F72.c.
Updated soundtest.c and soundtest.h substantially; loaded evidence confirms large line churn and bot-reported matches, but the diff excerpt does not include the soundtest hunks.
Added small supporting type/header changes in if/types.h, ifstatus.h, and sobjlib.h.

smart_moves.text: Updated owning headers with recovered signatures instead of leaving local unknown prototypes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: if_2F72.h and ifmagnify.h replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS entries with typed prototypes

smart_moves.text: Used existing engine APIs for GObj/JObj setup, animation, archive loading, audio playback, camera setup, and viewport/scissor setup rather than leaving all calls opaque.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: calls to GObj_Create, HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, GObj_SetupGXLink, HSD_JObjReqAnimAll, HSD_JObjAnimAll, lbArchive_LoadSections, lbAudioAx_800237A8, HSD_CObjSetOrtho

smart_moves.text: Kept address-style function names where semantics were not fully recovered, while using clearer local variable names for obvious roles such as gobj, jobj, slot, idx, frame, result, and viewport.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_802F7288, fn_802F77F8, ifMagnify_802FC618 local variable naming

decomp_lessons.lesson: High match progress can land even with rough source, but reviewer feedback should flag generated-looking shapes such as many unrolled loops for later cleanup rather than treating them as preferred style.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: reviewer says 'Some of this is pretty rough, for example there are a lot of unrolled loops. But I can't argue with the match progress.'

decomp_lessons.lesson: When decompiling interface modules, recovered function bodies should be paired with header prototype updates once signatures are evident from the bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: if_2F72.h and ifmagnify.h prototype updates

decomp_lessons.lesson: Cross-TU use of a previously static data table may require adjusting linkage and declarations, but the PR evidence alone does not prove broader data ownership beyond this ifStatus_803F9628 use.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifStatus_803F9628 changed from static to external array

naming_conventions.name: Address-style unknown functions
naming_conventions.description: Functions with unrecovered semantics retained address-style names such as fn_802F7288, fn_802F77F8, fn_80300CC8, and un_8030178C.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report soundtest fn_/un_ names

naming_conventions.name: Subsystem-prefixed recovered functions
naming_conventions.description: Interface functions use subsystem prefixes such as if_802F73C4 and ifMagnify_802FC618.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: if_2F72.c and ifmagnify.c function definitions

naming_conventions.name: Role-based locals
naming_conventions.description: Clear local roles are named gobj, jobj, slot, idx, frame, viewport, cobj, idesc, entry, base, and result.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used explicit loops in some repeated slot scans and cleanup routines.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_802F75D4 and fn_802F7670 loops over 6 entries
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Reviewer still observed many unrolled loops elsewhere, so this PR is not evidence that all repeated slot logic was cleaned into natural loops.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Left some slot dispatch as explicit branch ladders/index arithmetic, likely for matching pressure.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_802F770C slot detection branch ladder
raw_diff: fn_802F7994 slot detection branch ladder
text_corpus.jsonl: reviewer notes many unrolled loops
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Current standards prefer testing natural loops or canonical control flow before preserving these shapes.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used raw byte/pointer arithmetic for some partially typed structures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifMagnify_802FC618 uses u8* player0 + offsets
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Grounded as PR behavior only; standards would prefer typed fields when recoverable.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used a volatile local for default value selection in ifMagnify_802FC7C0.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: No PR comment explains why volatile was needed; treat as a matching tactic requiring verifier evidence under current standards.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Kept expanded jobj.h assert/dirty-matrix logic around direct jobj->translate assignment.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Current standards suggest mapping identifiable header inline/assert expansions back to canonical helpers when possible.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced static string data for an archive section name and used it in lbArchive_LoadSections.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: if_802F7E24 passes lbl_803F9780 to lbArchive_LoadSections
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The diff comment calls these orphaned ROM strings, but no separate section-ownership proof is included in the loaded evidence.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.body: Some of this is pretty rough, for example there are a lot of unrolled loops. But I can't argue with the match progress.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.body: Matched code increased by 5388 bytes; report lists 57 new matches and 31 improvements in unmatched functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report for GALE01 af6f07f - 67f8cc4

follow_up_queries: PR 2075 soundtest.c full diff unrolled loops

text_corpus.jsonl: bot report and approving review
notes: raw_diff is truncated; soundtest.c has the largest change but its detailed hunks are not loaded.
There are no inline review comments in the loaded slice.
The bot report supports match-progress claims, but no local build commands, objdiff screenshots, or manual validation notes are included beyond the automated report.
Reviewer explicitly flags rough source and unrolled loops; do not infer that those shapes are preferred or globally accepted style.
Data/string ownership for lbl_803F9780/lbl_803F9798 is only asserted by a code comment in the diff, not independently proven in this slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2075: large if-module matching with rough-loop review caveat
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2075 delivered substantial if-module match progress, including 57 new matches per bot report, while reviewer ribbanya approved with the caveat that parts were rough and had many unrolled loops. Use as historical evidence that match progress sometimes landed with rough generated-looking loop shapes, not as evidence that unrolled loops are preferred.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2075: recovered function bodies drove header prototype updates
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR replaced multiple UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations in if_2F72.h and ifmagnify.h with typed prototypes alongside added function bodies, consistent with keeping owning headers truthful when signatures are recovered.

source_update_candidates.title: Add PR 2075 as cautionary evidence for unrolled-loop cleanup
source_update_candidates.text: Historical review in PR #2075 approved major match progress but explicitly noted that the source was rough and had many unrolled loops. This can be cited as a caution under natural-loops/infer-authored-source-style: match progress alone does not make unrolled repeated blocks preferred final source.
source_update_candidates.reason: The current standards already cover this principle; curator may want this PR as a concrete historical example.

source_update_candidates.title: Use PR 2075 as example of tactics needing evidence
source_update_candidates.text: The diff shows volatile local use, raw pointer arithmetic, expanded jobj.h assert/dirty logic, and static string symbols in a matching PR. The loaded PR slice does not explain these tactics individually, so it is useful as an example of why such tactics need explicit verifier or ownership evidence before being treated as style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: volatile int default_val in ifMagnify_802FC7C0
raw_diff: u8* pointer arithmetic in ifMagnify_802FC618/ifMagnify_802FC750
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful as a review checklist example, but not as proof that the tactics were necessary.

source_update_candidates.title: if module matching scope for PR 2075
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2075 touched src/melee/if/soundtest.c, if_2F72.c, ifmagnify.c, ifstatus.c, headers, and if/types.h, with a small addition to src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.h.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help path-level historical search for if/soundtest decomp activity.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the unrolled loops in this PR as accepted style; the only human review comment calls them rough.
Do not claim all changed functions matched. Bot report distinguishes 57 new matches from 31 improvements in unmatched functions.
Do not infer exact soundtest implementation tactics from the loaded diff because the soundtest.c hunks are not included in the excerpt.
Do not treat lbl_803F9780/lbl_803F9798 data ownership as proven beyond the diff comment without additional symbol/section evidence.
